title: REVES: REvision and VErification--Augmented Training for Test-Time Scaling
authors: Yuanxin Liu, Ruida Zhou, Xinyan Zhao, Amr Sharaf, Hongzhou Lin, Arijit Biswas, Mohammad Ghavamzadeh, Zhaoran Wang, Mingyi Hong
publish: arXiv
abstract: Test-time scaling via sequential revision has emerged as a powerful paradigm for enhancing Large Language Model (LLM) reasoning. However, standard post-training methods primarily optimize single-shot objectives, creating a fundamental misalignment with multi-step inference dynamics. While recent work treats this as multi-turn reinforcement learning (RL), conventional approaches optimize over the multi-step trajectories directly, failing to further exploit the high-quality mistakes in intermediate steps that model can learn from correcting them. We propose a two-stage iterative framework that alternates between online data/prompt augmentation and policy optimization. By converting the intermediate steps (``near-miss'' answers) in the successful recovery trajectories into decoupled revision and verification prompts, our approach concentrates training on both effective answer transformation and error identification. This approach enables efficient off-policy data generation and reduces the computational overhead of long-horizon sampling compared to standard multi-turn RL. On LiveCodeBench, using publicly available test cases as feedback, we observe gains of +6.5 points over the RL baseline and +4.0 points over standard multi-turn training. Beyond coding, our approach matches the previously reported SOTA result on circle packing while using the smallest base model (4B) and far fewer rollouts than the much larger evolutionary search systems. Math results under ground-truth verification further confirm improved correction ability. It also generalizes to out-of-distribution constraint-satisfaction puzzles such as n\_queens and mini\_sudoku, where correctness is defined entirely by problem constraints. Code is available at https://github.com/yxliu02/REVES.git.
title_zh: REVES：修订与验证——测试时扩展的增强训练
abstract_zh: 通过顺序修订的测试时缩放已成为增强大型语言模型（LLM）推理能力的强大范式。然而，标准的后训练方法主要优化单次目标，这与多步推理动态存在根本性的不匹配。虽然近期研究将其视为多轮强化学习（RL），但传统方法直接优化多步轨迹，未能进一步利用中间步骤中的高质量错误——模型可以通过纠正这些错误来学习。我们提出了一个两阶段迭代框架，在在线数据/提示增强和策略优化之间交替进行。通过将成功恢复轨迹中的中间步骤（“近似正确”答案）转化为解耦的修订和验证提示，我们的方法将训练集中在有效的答案转换和错误识别上。与标准的多轮强化学习相比，这种方法实现了高效的非策略数据生成，并减少了长程采样的计算开销。在LiveCodeBench上，使用公开可用的测试用例作为反馈，我们观察到相比强化学习基线提高了6.5个百分点，相比标准多轮训练提高了4.0个百分点。在编程之外，我们的方法在圆形装箱问题上匹配了先前报告的最优结果，同时使用了最小的基础模型（4B参数），并且相比大得多的进化搜索系统，使用的搜索次数少得多。在真实值验证下的数学结果进一步证实了改进的纠错能力。该方法还能泛化到分布外约束满足问题，如n皇后和迷你数独，其中正确性完全由问题约束定义。代码可在 https://github.com/yxliu02/REVES.git 获取。

title: SWE-Future: Forecast-Conditioned Data Synthesis for Future-Oriented Software Engineering Agents
authors: Qiao Zhao, JianYing Qu, Jun Zhang, Yehua Yang, Hanwen Du, Zhongkai Sun
publish: arXiv
abstract: Realistic coding-agent benchmarks often replay public GitHub issues and pull requests, making them vulnerable to overlap with model pretraining, fine-tuning, synthetic-data generation, or benchmark-driven model selection. Fully synthetic tasks avoid direct historical replay, but can drift away from real repository needs. We propose SWE-Future, a forecast-conditioned data synthesis method for future-oriented coding tasks. Given a forecast snapshot at time $T_0$, the method uses only pre-$T_0$ repository evidence to forecast future feature implementation/enhancement, bugfix, and refactor task families. We first validate this forecasting step retrospectively: after forecasts are fixed, later pull requests are used only to measure whether the predicted task families match future repository work. In an 80-repository study, the forecaster achieves 58.1\% future-work relevance under the main semantic matching metric. We then use validated forecast families as conditioning signals to synthesize a 200-task coding-agent dataset across 61 repositories from a task-generation snapshot, rather than replaying the later pull requests used for validation. SWE-Future shows that repository-evolution forecasts can guide realistic, future-oriented coding-task synthesis while reducing direct dependence on historical pull-request replay.
title_zh: SWE-Future：面向未来软件工程智能体的预测条件数据合成
abstract_zh: 现实的编码代理基准测试常常重放公开的GitHub问题与拉取请求，这使得它们容易与模型预训练、微调、合成数据生成或基准驱动的模型选择产生重叠。完全合成的任务虽然避免了直接的历史重放，但可能偏离真实的代码库需求。我们提出SWE-Future，一种面向未来编码任务的、基于预测条件的数据合成方法。给定时间点$T_0$的预测快照，该方法仅利用$T_0$之前的代码库证据，来预测未来的功能实现/增强、错误修复和重构任务族。我们首先通过回顾性方式验证了这一预测步骤：在预测被固定后，后续的拉取请求仅用于衡量预测的任务族是否与未来的代码库工作匹配。在一项涵盖80个代码库的研究中，预测器在主要语义匹配指标下达到了58.1%的未来工作相关性。随后，我们利用经过验证的预测任务族作为条件信号，从一个任务生成快照中合成了一个包含200个任务的编码代理数据集，覆盖61个代码库，而无需重放用于验证的后续拉取请求。SWE-Future表明，代码库演化预测可以指导现实且面向未来的编码任务合成，同时减少对历史拉取请求重放的直接依赖。

title: PYPILINE: Malicious PyPI Package Detection via Suspicious API Knowledge and Agent Workflow
authors: Siyuan Pang, Zhengwei Jiang, Yepeng Yao, Zijing Fan, Haozhe Li, Baoxu Liu
publish: arXiv
abstract: The detection of malicious PyPI packages is crucial for maintaining the security of the open source software supply chain. Existing methods, which primarily rely on rules or traditional machine learning, suffer from poor interpretability and difficulty in adapting to novel attacks. To address this, we propose PYPILINE, a novel detection method that combines a suspicious API knowledge base with an Agent workflow. PYPILINE first conducts static analysis on known malicious packages, extracting abstract syntax trees and generating API call graphs, from which it automatically extracts and constructs a structured suspicious API knowledge base. During the detection phase, this knowledge base is used to enhance reasoning capabilities. Through an Agent workflow, PYPILINE performs in depth semantic analysis of unknown packages and outputs a structured, interpretable maliciousness assessment report. The experimental results show that PYPILINE significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art tools in precision of 96.7\%, recall of 99.6\%, and F1-score of 98.1\%, with its precision surpassing baseline tools by 5.7 to 24.2 percentage points. Additionally, we conducted an empirical study on malicious packages, systematically revealing prevalent attack strategies, as well as the most commonly abused APIs. Equipped with tool-calling AI agent workflows for automated vector database retrieval of suspicious API knowledge and mail server delivery of analysis reports, PYPILINE delivers a practical, efficient, and convenient malicious package detection solution to strengthen open-source ecosystem security.
title_zh: PYPILINE：基于可疑API知识与智能体工作流的恶意PyPI包检测
abstract_zh: 检测恶意PyPI包对于维护开源软件供应链安全至关重要。现有方法主要依赖规则或传统机器学习，存在可解释性差且难以适应新型攻击的问题。为此，我们提出PYPILINE——一种结合可疑API知识库与Agent工作流的新型检测方法。PYPILINE首先对已知恶意包进行静态分析，提取抽象语法树并生成API调用图，从中自动提取并构建结构化可疑API知识库。在检测阶段，该知识库被用于增强推理能力。通过Agent工作流，PYPILINE对未知包进行深度语义分析，并输出结构化、可解释的恶意性评估报告。实验结果表明，PYPILINE在精确率96.7%、召回率99.6%和F1分数98.1%上显著优于现有最优工具，其精确率比基线工具高出5.7至24.2个百分点。此外，我们对恶意包进行了实证研究，系统揭示了常见攻击策略以及最常被滥用的API。借助调用工具的AI代理工作流（用于自动向量数据库检索可疑API知识）和邮件服务器投递分析报告，PYPILINE提供了一个实用、高效且便捷的恶意包检测方案，以加强开源生态系统安全。

title: No Two Developers Think Alike: How Problem-Solving Styles and Experience Shape Needs in Conversational Interaction with Copilot
authors: Jonan Richards, Bruno Alves de Oliveira, Iury Oliveira, Igor Wiese, Mairieli Wessel
publish: arXiv
abstract: Conversational LLM-based ``programming assistants'' provide a range of benefits to developers. However, recent studies demonstrate the variety in individual developers' needs regarding programming assistants, and challenges encountered by only specific groups of developers. In this study, we explore the role of cognitive diversity in shaping interactions with GitHub Copilot chat. Through a mixed-methods think aloud study with 27 professional developers and students, we characterize 5 distinct ``interaction modes'' and 10 underlying needs in developers' interactions, forming a conceptual model. We characterize links between these modes, needs, and developers' problem-solving styles and experience profiles, showing how cognitive diversity may shape developers' interactions. We provide insights and recommendations for researchers and practitioners on how to design, research, and employ programming assistants to better account for diverse developer needs.
title_zh: 开发者想法各异：问题解决风格与经验如何塑造与Copilot对话交互中的需求
abstract_zh: 基于LLM的对话式“编程助手”为开发者提供了诸多益处。然而，近期研究表明，开发者对编程助手的需求存在差异，且只有特定群体才会遇到挑战。在本研究中，我们探讨了认知多样性如何塑造用户与GitHub Copilot Chat的互动。通过对27名专业开发者和学生进行混合方法的出声思维研究，我们描述了开发者互动中的5种不同“交互模式”及10项潜在需求，并构建了一个概念模型。我们揭示了这些模式、需求与开发者的问题解决风格及经验概况之间的关联，展示了认知多样性如何可能影响开发者的互动。我们为研究人员和实践者提供见解与建议，以设计、研究和运用编程助手，从而更好地满足多样化的开发者需求。

title: Toward Semantically-Seeded, Graph-Propagated Impact Analysis Across Software Artifacts: A Vision
authors: Momil Seedat
publish: arXiv
abstract: When a single software artifact changes - a requirement, a configuration value, or a function - engineers must determine what else is impacted. Existing change-impact-analysis (CIA) tooling tends to rely on one of two signals in isolation: semantic similarity recovered from text (information-retrieval traceability, code search, embeddings), or structural dependency following (call graphs, IDE "find usages", test-impact selection). Each has a characteristic blind spot. A semantically driven tool misses an impacted artifact whose text shares no vocabulary with the change; a structurally driven tool misses artifacts related in meaning but not joined by an edge, and most operate only over code rather than the Requirement-Config-Service-Test chain. We argue for a training-free and interpretable analyzer that fuses both signals over the same embeddings. We model the system as a heterogeneous artifact graph with typed edges recovered by static analysis, compute a semantic prior by cosine similarity to the changed artifact, propagate impact multi-hop with decay over a row-normalized propagation matrix, and blend the two with a single tunable weight lambda. A small but complete proof-of-concept on a payment subsystem (5 labelled change scenarios) shows the mechanism we care about: artifacts with zero textual overlap with the change are still recovered through propagation, and helper functions that propagation alone cannot reach are recovered through the semantic layer. The fusion is the only configuration that covers both blind spots, and lambda acts as an explicit precision/recall control. Drawing on four publicly documented production failures, we argue that the same formulation extends to operational artifacts (images, metrics, dashboards, data schemas) that code-only analysis cannot reach.
title_zh: 面向基于语义种子与图传播的跨软件制品影响分析：一个愿景
abstract_zh: 当单一软件工件发生变化时（如需求、配置值或函数），工程师必须确定哪些其他部分会受到影响。现有的变更影响分析（CIA）工具往往依赖两种信号中的一种：通过文本恢复的语义相似性（信息检索可追溯性、代码搜索、嵌入向量），或基于结构依赖的追踪（调用图、IDE“查找引用”、测试影响选择）。每种方法都存在典型的盲区。语义驱动工具会遗漏那些文本与变更无共享词汇的受影响工件；结构驱动工具则会遗漏含义相关但无直接依赖边相连的工件，且大多数工具仅针对代码而非“需求-配置-服务-测试”链条进行运算。我们主张采用一种无需训练且可解释的分析器，它在同一嵌入向量空间内融合了两种信号。我们将系统建模为异质工件图，其有向边通过静态分析恢复；通过余弦相似度计算与变更工件的语义先验；利用行归一化传播矩阵实现带衰减的多跳影响传播；并通过一个可调权重参数λ将两者融合。在一个支付子系统（含5个标注变更场景）上实现的小型但完整的概念验证，展示了我们关注的机制：与变更无文本重叠的工件仍可通过传播被恢复，而传播本身无法触及的辅助函数则通过语义层被恢复。融合方法是唯一能覆盖两种盲区的配置，且λ可作为显式的精确率/召回率控制参数。借鉴四个公开记录的生产故障案例，我们论证了同一方法可扩展至代码分析无法触及的运行态工件（镜像、指标、仪表盘、数据模式）。

title: Data Intelligence Agents: Interpreting, Modeling, and Querying Enterprise Data via Autonomous Coding Agents
authors: Anoushka Vyas, Aarushi Dhanuka, Sina Khoshfetrat Pakazad, Henrik Ohlsson
publish: arXiv
abstract: Production data integration is bottlenecked by repeated, lossy handoffs between data owners, engineers, and analysts who must collaboratively discover, structure, and query enterprise data. We present Data Intelligence Agents (DIA), a system of three agents (Data Interpreter, Schema Creator, and Query Generator) that compresses this workflow by treating autonomous coding agents (ACAs) as a first-class abstraction: rather than emitting text, the agents generate, execute, validate, and repair concrete artifacts, draw on a shared memory for experience reuse, and surface each for review by domain experts. DIA is deployed in production for enterprise customers. We study the Query Generator in depth and evaluate it in fully autonomous mode across seven SQL benchmarks spanning four task categories and four dialects. It matches or surpasses the best published results on all seven, demonstrating that an architecture grounded in execution, built on ACAs and a shared memory, generalizes across the data intelligence workload with adaptation confined to natural-language instructions.
title_zh: 数据智能代理：通过自主编码代理解释、建模和查询企业数据
abstract_zh: 生产数据集成面临数据所有者、工程师和分析师之间反复且损耗高的交接瓶颈，他们需要协作发现、构建和查询企业数据。本文提出数据智能代理（DIA），一个由三个代理（数据解释器、模式创建器和查询生成器）组成的系统，通过将自主编码代理（ACA）作为一级抽象来压缩这一工作流程：这些代理不再生成文本，而是生成、执行、验证和修复具体工件，利用共享内存实现经验重用，并将每个工件提交给领域专家审查。DIA已在企业客户的生产环境中部署。我们深入研究了查询生成器，在完全自主模式下对其进行了评估，覆盖了七个SQL基准测试，涉及四个任务类别和四种方言。在所有七个基准测试中，它均达到或超越了已发表的最佳结果，证明了这种基于执行、构建于ACA和共享内存之上的架构能够泛化到数据智能工作负载，仅需在自然语言指令层面进行调整。

title: CodeSentinel: A Three-Layer Defense Against Indirect Prompt Injection in Code Contexts
authors: Po-Han Cheng, Chia-Mu Yu, Ying-Dar Lin, Yu-Sung Wu, Wei-Bin Lee
publish: arXiv
abstract: Code large language models increasingly retrieve external code context from repositories, documentation, issue threads, and coding-agent environments, creating an indirect prompt-injection surface where attackers hide instructions in comments, strings, identifiers, or decoy code. We propose CodeSentinel, a three-layer inference-time sanitizer. It uses Tree-sitter to extract high-risk model-facing CST nodes, then combines syntax-guided pre-filtering, CST-guided Dynamic Min-K\% scoring, and node perturbation analysis to detect adversarial and natural-looking semantic triggers. Detected nodes are removed or neutralized before reaching the downstream Code LLM. Across six recent attack families, \CodeSentinel achieves 0.80 average node-level F1, outperforming CodeGarrison, DePA, and KillBadCode.
title_zh: CodeSentinel：代码上下文中针对间接提示注入的三层防御
abstract_zh: 大型代码语言模型越来越多地从代码仓库、文档、问题讨论线程和编码代理环境中检索外部代码上下文，这创建了一个间接提示注入面，攻击者可将指令隐藏于注释、字符串、标识符或诱饵代码中。我们提出CodeSentinel，一种三层推理时清洗器。它使用Tree-sitter提取高风险的模型可见CST节点，然后结合语法引导的预过滤、CST引导的动态Min-K%评分以及节点扰动分析，检测对抗性和看似自然的语义触发器。检测到的节点在到达下游代码LLM之前会被移除或中和。在六个最新的攻击家族中，CodeSentinel在节点级别上实现了0.80的平均F1值，优于CodeGarrison、DePA和KillBadCode。

title: Code-Augur: Agentic Vulnerability Detection via Specification Inference
authors: Zhengxiong Luo, Mehtab Zafar, Dylan Wolff, Abhik Roychoudhury
publish: arXiv
abstract: The advent of agentic vulnerability detection is already becoming a watershed moment for software security. Audits conducted entirely by autonomous LLM agents are uncovering critical vulnerabilities in fundamental software underpinning digital society. Many of these vulnerabilities remained masked for years, surfacing only now with AI agents. Yet the reasoning behind these discoveries remains alarmingly opaque and unvalidated. What assumptions did the agent make about a function's inputs when it deemed that function to be secure? Failures in reasoning and incorrect assumptions can lead to missed vulnerabilities and reduce trust in agentic analysis. We propose a security-specification-first paradigm that (1) exposes the agent's tacit assumptions explicitly as security specifications and (2) continuously refines those specifications via runtime falsification. We realize our approach in Code-Augur, a novel harness for agentic vulnerability detection. Given a codebase, Code-Augur analyzes each component of the system for vulnerable code. When it deems a component to be secure, it commits the local invariants behind that judgment as in-source assertions. In parallel, Code-Augur leverages a guided fuzzer to attempt to falsify those assumptions. When the fuzzer triggers an assertion, this either reveals a genuine vulnerability or a flawed specification to refine. In both cases, this process grounds the agent's understanding, aligning its view of code intent with how the code actually behaves. On real-world subjects, Code-Augur effectively leverages security specifications to detect more vulnerabilities than other state-of-the-art agents. Additionally, Code-Augur found 22 new vulnerabilities in key open-source projects. Compared to curated specialized models like Claude Mythos, Code-Augur offers effective agentic vulnerability detection built on widely available LLMs like Sonnet and DeepSeek.
title_zh: Code-Augur：通过规范推断的自主漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 以代理驱动的漏洞检测的出现，已成为软件安全领域的分水岭时刻。完全由自主LLM代理执行的审计，正在发现支撑数字社会的基础软件中的关键漏洞。许多这些漏洞多年来一直隐藏，直到现在才因AI代理而浮出水面。然而，这些发现背后的推理过程却令人担忧地不透明且未经验证：当代理判定某个函数安全时，它对函数输入做出了哪些假设？推理失败和错误假设可能导致漏洞遗漏，并降低对代理分析结果的信任。我们提出了一种以安全规范为先的范式，该范式（1）将代理的隐性假设明确作为安全规范暴露出来，（2）通过运行时证伪持续优化这些规范。我们通过Code-Augur实现了这一方法，它是一种用于代理驱动漏洞检测的新型框架。给定一个代码库，Code-Augur分析系统中每个组件的漏洞代码。当它判定某个组件安全时，会将支撑该判定的局部不变式作为源码级断言提交。同时，Code-Augur利用引导式模糊测试器试图证伪这些假设。当模糊测试触发断言时，要么揭示出真实漏洞，要么暴露需要改进的有缺陷规范。在这两种情况下，这一过程都夯实了代理的理解，使其对代码意图的理解与实际代码行为保持一致。在真实世界场景中，Code-Augur有效利用安全规范，相比其他最先进的代理检测出更多漏洞。此外，Code-Augur在关键开源项目中发现了22个新漏洞。与Claude Mythos等精心定制的专用模型相比，Code-Augur基于Sonnet和DeepSeek等广泛可用的LLM构建，提供了有效的代理驱动漏洞检测。

title: Where Did the Variability Go? From Vibe Coding to Product Lines by Regeneration
authors: Xhevahire Tërnava
publish: arXiv
abstract: In vibe coding, an emerging AI-driven paradigm, an LLM generates an entire program from a natural language prompt, but what happens to the variability that traditional software engineering carefully builds into code? To answer this question, we conducted an exploratory analysis on 10 vibe coded C/C++ projects, which suggests that there is near-zero in-artifact variability, i.e., at compile and runtime. All variability decisions are resolved at a single new binding time, generation time, the moment the LLM produces the source code. Rather than treating this as a defect to fix, we propose Variability by Regeneration (VbR), to our knowledge the first product-line approach in which the LLM acts as the derivation engine, generating a purpose-built, free of dead code binary for each variant from a declarative specification, while a variant dispatcher transparently routes user requests to the matching binary. We formalise VbR, contrast it with classical SPL derivation, and demonstrate its full pipeline on a wc product family. For SPL engineering, variability in AI-generated software belongs in the specification, not in the code.
title_zh: 变异性去哪了？从氛围编码到产品线的再生
abstract_zh: 在氛围编码这一新兴的AI驱动范式下，大语言模型根据自然语言提示生成完整程序，但传统软件工程精心构建到代码中的可变性会怎样？为回答此问题，我们对10个采用氛围编码的C/C++项目进行了探索性分析，结果表明在制品内部（即编译期和运行时）几乎不存在可变性。所有可变性决策都在一个新的单一绑定时间——生成时间（即LLM生成源代码的时刻）被解决。我们没有将其视为需要修复的缺陷，而是提出了"基于再生的可变性"（VbR）方法——据我们所知，这是首个将LLM作为派生引擎的产品线方法：从声明式规范中为每个变体生成目标明确、无死代码的二进制文件，同时变体调度器透明地将用户请求路由至匹配的二进制文件。我们对VbR进行了形式化定义，将其与经典SPL派生进行对比，并在一个wc产品家族上展示了完整流水线。对于SPL工程而言，AI生成软件中的可变性应存在于规范中，而非代码中。

title: Graph-ESBMC-PLC: Formal Verification of Graphical PLCopen XML Ladder Diagram Programs Using SMT-Based Model Checking
authors: Pierre Dantas, Lucas Cordeiro, Waldir Junior
publish: arXiv
abstract: PLCopen XML defines two encoding formats for IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram programs: a textual encoding using <rung> elements, and a graphical encoding that represents rung logic as a directed graph of localId/refLocalId connections. ESBMC-PLC supported the textual format but parsed graphical exports from CONTROLLINO, Beremiz, and OpenPLC Editor into an empty GOTO intermediate representation, causing vacuous verification success. This paper presents Graph-ESBMC-PLC, which closes this gap with a DFS-based graphical LD resolver. The resolver traverses the connection graph from leftPowerRail to each coil, extracts rung paths as Boolean contact conjunctions, and applies a three-tier I/O inference scheme. Ordering coils by rightPowerRail connectionPointIn sequence ensures SET coils process before RESET coils, matching IEC scan-cycle semantics. The graphical-to-IR conversion leaves the ESBMC backend unchanged. Validation on 3 graphical LD programs from CONTROLLINO/OpenPLC Editor shows all produce full GOTO IR with nondeterministic inputs and rung logic, versus the empty IR previously. All 3 verify SAFE at k=2 under 70ms. The 11 textual LD benchmarks are fully preserved, with no regression. Two Beremiz examples with no LD content or unsupported timer semantics are reported as discovered limitations. Artifact at Zenodo (DantasCordeiro2026graphical, doi:10.5281/zenodo.20699856).
title_zh: Graph-ESBMC-PLC：基于SMT模型检测的图形化PLCopen XML梯形图程序形式验证
abstract_zh: PLCopen XML 为 IEC 61131-3 梯形图程序定义了两种编码格式：一种使用 `<rung>` 元素进行文本编码，另一种采用图形编码，将梯形逻辑表示为以 `localId`/`refLocalId` 连接为节点的有向图。ESBMC-PLC 支持文本格式，但在解析来自 CONTROLLINO、Beremiz 和 OpenPLC Editor 的图形导出文件时，会生成空的 GOTO 中间表示，导致验证结果空洞地通过。本文提出 Graph-ESBMC-PLC，通过基于深度优先搜索（DFS）的图形化梯形图解析器填补了这一空白。该解析器从左侧电源轨出发遍历连接图直至每个线圈，提取梯形路径作为布尔触点合取，并应用三层 I/O 推理方案。按右侧电源轨的 `connectionPointIn` 序列对线圈排序，确保 SET 线圈在 RESET 线圈之前处理，从而匹配 IEC 扫描周期语义。图形到中间表示的转换无需修改 ESBMC 后端。在来自 CONTROLLINO/OpenPLC Editor 的 3 个图形化梯形图程序上的验证表明，所有程序均生成了包含非确定性输入和梯形逻辑的完整 GOTO 中间表示，而非之前的空表示。所有 3 个程序在 k=2 时于 70ms 内验证为 SAFE。原有的 11 个文本梯形图基准测试全部保留，无回归问题。报告了两个 Beremiz 示例中的局限性：一个不含梯形图内容，另一个采用不支持的定时器语义。工件见 Zenodo（DantasCordeiro2026graphical，doi:10.5281/zenodo.20699856）。

title: PhantomSkill: Malicious Code Injection in Agent Skill Ecosystems
authors: Yu-Ting Lin, Chia-Mu Yu
publish: arXiv
abstract: Agent skills allow LLM-based coding agents to acquire domain-specific capabilities from third-party packages, but they also introduce a new supply-chain attack surface. We present PhantomSkill, an attack framework that hides malicious behavior in a skill's auxiliary resources rather than in its textual description. Its core technique, VulMask, rewrites overt malicious scripts into vulnerability-shaped implementations whose malicious behavior is activated only under attacker-controlled trigger conditions. This design shifts the visible signal from explicit malicious intent to ordinary-looking insecure code. Across representative host skills, attack goals, coding agents, generation models, and automated reviewers, VulMask preserves benign utility while reducing warning and malware-level detection compared with overt malicious scripts. Our results show that skill ecosystems require resource-level vetting, execution-time containment, and security policies that treat exploitable vulnerabilities in agent skills as potential malicious payloads.
title_zh: PhantomSkill: 智能体技能生态系统中的恶意代码注入
abstract_zh: 智能体技能使得基于大语言模型的编码智能体能够从第三方包中获取特定领域的能力，但同时也引入了新的供应链攻击面。我们提出了PhantomSkill攻击框架，该框架将恶意行为隐藏在技能的辅助资源中，而非其文本描述中。其核心技术VulMask将显式恶意脚本重写为具有漏洞形态的实现，其恶意行为仅在攻击者控制的触发条件下被激活。这种设计将可见信号从显式恶意意图转变为看似普通的、不安全的代码。在典型的主机技能、攻击目标、编码智能体、生成模型和自动审核者中，与显式恶意脚本相比，VulMask在保持良性实用性的同时，减少了警告和恶意软件级别的检测。我们的结果表明，技能生态系统需要资源级别的审查、执行时的隔离以及安全策略，这些策略应将智能体技能中可利用的漏洞视为潜在恶意负载。

title: Attention as Frustrated Synchronization
authors: Joshua Nunley
publish: arXiv
abstract: A network of oscillators that synchronizes perfectly computes nothing further, so an attention architecture built from synchronization must locate its computation in structured departures from agreement. We introduce the Frustrated Synchronization Network (FSN), whose token states are phases on a torus and whose entire value pathway is one learned complex coupling kernel over harmonics and a one-step delay. Each component of the kernel is a frustration in the sense of the synchronization literature. The complex phases are static Kuramoto-Sakaguchi frustration angles, the signed harmonics are repulsive Daido components, and the delay term, which couples each token to the successors of the tokens it attends to, is algebraically identical to Kuramoto-Sakaguchi coupling whose frustration angle is the data's own transition, so next-token prediction is implemented as synchronization frustrated by the data. At matched one-million-parameter and training budgets on character-level text and code, the FSN's validation loss is below a tuned RoPE-SwiGLU transformer's at every epoch measured, and the comparison survives training the baseline to convergence: every thirty-epoch enwik8 seed finishes below the transformer's converged fifty-epoch loss of 1.611, and the FSN's completed fifty-epoch runs converge to 1.5953 +/- 0.0014. A variant with every feed-forward block replaced by mean-field coupling to learned collective modes, leaving no multilayer perceptron in the stack, tracks the transformer. On natural text the unfrustrated base layer falls behind the converged transformer at every copy depth, worst on long-range copy events; the kernel reverses the deficit at every depth of four and beyond. Headline comparisons are at the one-million-parameter scale; a scale ladder is complete through four million parameters with the advantage persisting, and remaining arms are marked as in progress.
title_zh: 注意力作为受挫同步
abstract_zh: 一个完全同步的振荡器网络无法进一步进行计算，因此基于同步构建的注意力架构必须通过结构化的意见分歧来实现其计算功能。我们提出受阻同步网络（FSN），其词元状态为环面上的相位，整个价值通路仅由一组学习得到的谐波复耦合核及一步延时构成。在同步文献的语境下，该核的每个分量均对应于一种"受阻"状态：复相位为静态Kuramoto-Sakaguchi受阻角，有符号谐波为排斥型Daido分量，而延时项（将每个词元与其所关注词元的后继相耦合）在代数形式上等同于Kuramoto-Sakaguchi耦合——其受阻角正是数据本身的转移特征，从而将下一词预测实现为受数据阻碍的同步过程。在百万参数量级与训练预算匹配的条件下（字符级文本与代码任务），FSN在每个测量周期内的验证损失均低于经调优的RoPE-SwiGLU变压器模型；该对比优势在基线模型训练至收敛后依然成立：每30轮训练的enwik8种子损失值均低于变压器模型收敛后50轮损失值1.611，而FSN完成50轮训练后的收敛损失为1.5953±0.0014。一种变体架构将所有前馈块替换为基于学习集体模态的平均场耦合（堆栈中不含任何多层感知器），其性能与变压器模型持平。在自然文本任务中，无受阻机制的底层基座在所有复制深度上的表现均落后于收敛后的变压器模型，尤其在长距离复制事件中最为明显；而受阻核在四个及以上层深时全面扭转了损失差距。上述对比基准均基于百万参数量级；目前已完成四百万参数规模的分级扩展实验，优势持续保持，其余实验分支标注为进行中。

title: OpenAnt: LLM-Powered Vulnerability Discovery Through Code Decomposition, Adversarial Verification, and Dynamic Testing
authors: Nahum Korda, Gadi Evron
publish: arXiv
abstract: Automated vulnerability discovery in large codebases remains challenging: traditional static analysis produces high false-positive rates, while dynamic approaches such as fuzzing require substantial infrastructure and often target narrow classes of bugs. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) enable semantic reasoning about program behavior, but applying LLMs to repository-scale security analysis introduces challenges related to context management, cost, and verification. We present OpenAnt, an open-source vulnerability discovery system that integrates static program analysis with LLM-based reasoning in a multi-stage pipeline. OpenAnt introduces three key techniques. First, codebases are decomposed into self-contained analysis units filtered by reachability from external entry points, reducing the analysis surface by up to 97% while preserving attack-relevant code. Second, candidate vulnerabilities undergo adversarial verification through constrained attacker simulation, where the model evaluates exploitability under realistic attacker capabilities. Third, findings are validated through dynamic verification, in which exploit environments are generated automatically, executed in sandboxed containers, and discarded after use. Evaluation on widely used open-source projects including OpenSSL, WordPress, and Flowise shows that this architecture can identify previously unknown vulnerabilities while maintaining manageable analysis cost and substantially reducing false positives. Our results suggest that closed-loop vulnerability discovery pipelines, combining semantic reasoning with exploit validation, provide a practical path toward scalable automated security analysis. OpenAnt is released as open source under the Apache 2.0 license at https://github.com/knostic/OpenAnt.
title_zh: OpenAnt：基于大语言模型的漏洞发现——通过代码分解、对抗验证与动态测试
abstract_zh: 在大规模代码库中进行自动化漏洞发现仍然充满挑战：传统静态分析会产生较高的误报率，而模糊测试等动态方法需要大量基础设施，且通常只针对有限类别的漏洞。近期大语言模型的进展使得对程序行为的语义推理成为可能，但将大语言模型应用于仓库级安全分析会引入上下文管理、成本和验证方面的难题。我们提出了OpenAnt——一个开源漏洞发现系统，它在多阶段流水线中融合了静态程序分析与基于大语言模型的推理。OpenAnt引入了三项关键技术。首先，代码库被分解为自包含的分析单元，并根据从外部入口点的可达性进行筛选，从而将分析面缩减高达97%，同时保留与攻击相关的代码。其次，候选漏洞通过受限攻击者模拟进行对抗性验证，由模型在现实攻击者能力下评估其可利用性。第三，通过动态验证对发现结果进行确认，其中自动生成利用环境，在沙箱容器中执行，并在使用后丢弃。在OpenSSL、WordPress和Flowise等广泛使用的开源项目上的评估表明，该架构能够识别先前未知的漏洞，同时保持可控的分析成本并大幅减少误报。我们的结果表明，将语义推理与利用验证相结合的闭环漏洞发现流水线，为实现可扩展的自动化安全分析提供了一条实用路径。OpenAnt以Apache 2.0许可证开源发布，地址为https://github.com/knostic/OpenAnt。

title: Compute-Budgeted Exploitability Evidence Graphs for Prospective Vulnerability Triage
authors: Faruk Alpay, Taylan Alpay
publish: arXiv
abstract: Defenders cannot patch every newly disclosed vulnerability at once, so exploitability prediction must be evaluated prospectively rather than retrospectively. We study compute-budgeted vulnerability triage in which each CVE is scored only from public evidence visible by a fixed decision time. Advisories, exploit archives, fix commits, and hacker-community discourse are represented as a temporal evidence graph; a budgeted selector admits only a few evidence documents per CVE, and every score is paired with an auditable certificate listing the supporting signals, timestamps, source layers, and leakage flags. On 12012 prospective CVEs from public sources, budgeted evidence selection raises leakage-safe prospective recall@50 from 0.010 for a severity-only baseline to 0.026, while two evidence documents per CVE capture most of the value. A strong cross-encoder reranker lowers prospective recall to 0.016, showing that semantic relevance to a CVE is not the same as evidence of exploitation. Most importantly, a naive random split with unfiltered evidence inflates apparent prospective recall by 8.5x and EPSS-high recall by 5.0x. The main contribution is a leakage-safe evaluation protocol and reproducible evidence certificates for contestable vulnerability-prioritization claims.
title_zh: 面向前瞻性漏洞分类的计算预算可利用性证据图
abstract_zh: 防御者无法同时修补所有新披露的漏洞，因此必须以前瞻性（而非回顾性）的方式评估可利用性预测。我们研究了计算预算下的漏洞分类问题：每个CVE仅根据固定决策时间点可见的公开证据进行评分。我们将安全公告、漏洞利用档案、修复提交记录以及黑客社区讨论构建为时间证据图；预算选择器对每个CVE仅允许少量证据文档，每个评分都附带一个可审计的证书，列出支持信号、时间戳、来源层级和泄漏标志。在来自公开来源的12012个前瞻性CVE上，预算证据选择将泄漏安全的前瞻性recall@50从仅基于严重性的基准值0.010提升至0.026，且每个CVE使用两个证据文档即可捕获大部分价值。强大的交叉编码器重排序器将前瞻性recall降至0.016，表明语义相关性与漏洞利用证据并非等同。最重要的是，使用未过滤证据的朴素随机分割会使前瞻性recall膨胀8.5倍，EPSS-high recall膨胀5.0倍。主要贡献在于：提出了泄漏安全的评估协议，并为可争议的漏洞优先级排序主张提供了可重现的证据证书。
